data.body:
## Scope

1. Remove `test_review_criteria_old_hash_absent` from tests/skills/test_implementation_plan_tdd_reviewer.py (one-time migration check, no ongoing value)

2. Clean up stale RED-phase comments in these files (tests now pass — comments are misleading):
   - tests/scripts/test-ticket-fsck-e2e.sh:28 — remove "SKIP: ticket-fsck.sh not yet implemented"
   - tests/skills/test-end-session-rationalized-failures.sh — remove "TDD RED: All 12 tests FAIL"
   - tests/skills/test-using-lockpick-clarification.sh — remove "TDD RED phase: all tests fail"
   - tests/skills/test_fix_cascade_recovery_handoff.py — remove "TDD spec for task w21-c60u (RED task)"
   - tests/scripts/test_bridge_alert_display.py — remove "These tests are RED"
   - tests/skills/test_end_skill_dirty_worktree_resolution.py — remove "TDD RED: This test fails"

Priority: 3 (cosmetic hygiene)
